findings.summary: 6 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #root > div > a (contrast 2.04), #root > div > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(1) > a (contrast 2.27), #root > div > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(2) > a (contrast 2.27), #root > div > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(3) > a (contrast 2.27), #root > div > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(4) > a (contrast 2.27)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.
